item.title: Style guide
item.description: Code style, naming conventions, and folder structure for Alchemy Engine.

item.title: Build System
item.description: ABT (Alchemy Build Tool) and CMake two-stage build pipeline for the engine.

item.title: Components
item.description: Component declaration, slots, slot hierarchies, constructors, and memory layout in Catalyst.

item.title: Entity Query
item.description: Query entities by component composition using ForEach, ForEachParallel, and filtered queries.

item.title: Testing Guide
item.description: Complete guide for writing, compiling, running, and analyzing Crucible tests. Written for AI agents.

item.title: Config Attribute
item.description: Persist object fields to human-editable .ini files with LocalConfig / GlobalConfig property attributes.

item.title: Concurrent Entity Creation in Catalyst
item.description: How Catalyst lets any thread create an entity and immediately use it, without deferral — the storage redesign, the concurrency model, and the findings along the way.

item.title: Custom Renderable Components
item.description: How to write a Sigil widget that draws itself — the EmitDraw + thunk-dispatch model, with the engine's built-in renderables as worked examples.

item.title: List Component
item.description: The Sigil List node (UIListComponent) — the single reconcile point for dynamic child counts.

item.title: Sigil
item.description: Sigil UI framework — a retained-mode UI built on Catalyst entities, plus an immediate-mode ImGui wrapper (SigilIM).
